title: ContractTermSheet
description: Structured encoding of contract term sheet clauses for Z3 verification

term_sheet_id.description: Unique identifier for this term sheet

description.description: Human-readable description of this term sheet

clauses.description: Named contract clauses with their logical terms

double_trigger_acceleration.description: Vesting acceleration requiring both change-of-control AND termination without cause

acceleration_pct.description: Percentage of unvested shares that accelerate

months_after_coc.description: Termination must occur within this many months of change-of-control

acceleration_is_automatic.description: True = acceleration triggers immediately with no further preconditions

board_veto.description: Board approval requirement that may block acceleration events

applies_to_all_acceleration.description: True = board approval required before ANY vesting acceleration

applies_to_double_trigger.description: True = board approval required specifically for double-trigger events

applies_to_single_trigger.description: True = board approval required for single-trigger events

is_unconditional.description: True = no additional conditions or approvals required

liquidation_preference.description: Preferred investor payout before common shareholders receive proceeds

participating.description: True = preferred also participates in remaining proceeds after preference

common_minimum.description: Guaranteed minimum percentage of exit proceeds for common shareholders

minimum_pct.description: Minimum percentage of exit proceeds guaranteed to common shareholders

exit_terms.description: Agreed exit scenario for liquidation math verification

proceeds_usd.description: Total exit proceeds available for distribution in USD
